title: Create Item and Status is X, notify Y
excerpt: I’d like to see more automations around item creation. There are many instances where when the item is created through a form, I’d like to instantly be able to trigger actions instead of having to change something first. …

posts.author: ian.mcauley (Ian McAuley)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to see more automations around item creation. There are many instances where when the item is created through a form, I’d like to instantly be able to trigger actions instead of having to change something first.

In this instance a flow like this would save me a ton of time:
When an item is created, and status is X, do Y.

Y could be various things such as NOTIFY, EMAIL, do any number of other actions. In this specific case, I’d like to ping a Slack channel with a custom message like “PERSON has notified the team that X PROJECT is in Y STATUS.”

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is already doable!

image723×320 12 KB

You can add conditions, just by clicking the + next to the trigger
